name: Tractor Simulator VR – Farming Games | Tractor Games - Become a Country Farmer

reviews.review_description: Neither game works. And no option to get a refund. DO NOT PURCHASE unless you want to just give money away.
The controls are awful in this game these games are absolute garbage save your money as you can't get a refund on this

reviews.review_title: Absolutely terrible. You don't want this
reviews.review_description: I don't know how this got any decent ratings. The controls are bad, the acceleration and breaking is terrible. It made me ill. The music is annoying and repetitive. There is no other interaction than with your controllers. This is not a game, it's a student project. It says early access but I don't think there has been any update in forever. It has one level and 5 challenges. You earn money but there's nothing to use it for.  It's a waste of time and money. My day is ruined.

Tractor Farming game is very good game. Graphics are good and tractor feel is awesome and music is bit odd. I would like if I can choose my custom play list. Harvesting the crops is always been a fun for me. Overall game experience is good and smooth. Would like to see more missions.

developer_response.body: Dear Player, Thank you for your positive review of our Tractor Farming VR game! We're thrilled to hear that you find the graphics and tractor feel awesome, and that harvesting crops brings you joy. We appreciate your feedback on the music and will consider adding a custom playlist feature. More missions are already in the pipeline to make your farming experience even more enjoyable. Happy harvesting!

reviews.review_description: This game might have been on Steam when I first tried it, which was very complicated with keyboard shortcuts to drive and handle equipment. This is easier but definitely not for the motion sickness people. Navigation choices in menu need to be bigger or make clicking target area bigger. Money bank numbers need to be bigger. Tip for oculus user set sitting boundary farther away from you to get full range of steering wheel. Hope this gets further development to open other challenges.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback on our tractor simulator VR game. We're glad you find the controls easier, but we'll work on reducing motion sickness and improving UI accessibility based on your suggestions. We'll also explore adding new challenges in future updates. Your input is invaluable to us, and we appreciate your support!
